# Gourmet Grazin'

> Kentucky's premier charcuterie catering service offering custom mobile carts, grazing tables, handcrafted boards, charcuterie cups & boxes, and hands-on charcuterie classes for weddings, corporate events, showers, and private parties.

## About

Gourmet Grazin' is a husband-and-wife owned charcuterie catering business based in Kentucky. We specialize in elevated, artfully styled food experiences for events of all sizes. Every board, table, and cart is curated with premium artisan cheeses, cured meats, seasonal fruits, and gourmet accompaniments.

## Services

### Luxury Cart Experiences
White-glove mobile charcuterie cart service. Our custom-built cart arrives fully stocked and served tableside by our team. Options include grazing carts ($400+), beverage bars ($250+), brunch spreads ($400+), and dessert displays ($400+). Serves 25-150+ guests.

### Grazing Tables
Stunning tablescapes overflowing with curated bites for 20-200+ guests. Perfect for weddings, corporate events, and large celebrations. Includes full setup, styling, and breakdown.

### Charcuterie Boards
Handcrafted boards starting at $65. Available styles: Classic, Sweet-Salty, Brunch, Veggie, Fruit, Game Day, Birthday, Easter, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Halloween, and Custom Message. Sizes: Small (2-5 people), Medium (5-10), Large (10-15), X-Large (15-20+).

### Charcuterie Cups & Boxes
Individual portions for grab-and-go elegance. Cups start at $8 each (15 minimum). Boxes start at $10 each (6 minimum). Options: Classic, Sweet Tooth, Yogurt, Seasonal, Brunch, and Custom Message.

### Charcuterie Classes
Hands-on board-building classes for 6-20 participants. All ingredients, supplies, and instruction included. Small group (6-10): $450. Large group (10-20): $600. Duration: ~90 minutes.

## Service Area
Kentucky, United States

## Key Facts
- Rating: 5.0 stars from 12 reviews on Facebook
- Price range: $$
- Payment: Credit Card, Debit Card
- Dietary accommodations: Vegetarian, gluten-free, nut-free, dairy-free options available
- Booking lead time: 1-2 months recommended, earlier for weddings and peak season
- Setup: Full setup and breakdown included, team arrives 30-60 minutes before event
